reference: Is it normal for an infant to shake his head when he feels sleepy? I have a son who is already six months old. Since he was three months old, I noticed that he usually shakes his head from left to right when he feels sleepy. He is still doing that until now. I am worried about it.
text: Is it normal for an infant to shake his head when he feels sleepy? I have a son who is already six months old. Since he was three months old, I noticed that he usually shakes his head from left to right when he feels sleepy. He is still doing that until now. I am worried about it.
